overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a rain-soaked rural property, moving between a yellow house and wooden carport before transitioning into a dense foggy forest. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with atmospheric volumetric fog and cinematic lighting typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked driveway between rural house and carport

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through heavy rain between the yellow house and wooden carport, approaching the white car

entered.detail: single-story yellow wooden house with blue window frames and wooden steps
classic white sedan parked in the driveway ahead
open wooden shelter structure with a sloped roof
large cylindrical barrel for collecting rainwater
satellite dish visible on roof of distant building

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow, rain-soaked driveway flanked by a yellow wooden house on the left and a wooden carport on the right. Heavy rain creates ripples on the wet ground as the viewer approaches a white vintage car parked ahead. The atmosphere is dark and foreboding with limited visibility due to the storm.

events.description: passing the house corner and entering the dense coniferous forest

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the dark forest, navigating between tall pine trees in the heavy rain

entered.detail: thick dark tree trunk immediately visible upon entering the woods
tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy overhead
thick atmospheric fog hanging between the trees reducing visibility
dense grass and low vegetation covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly from the rural property into a dense, foggy forest. The camera moves between towering pine trees as heavy rain continues to fall, creating a dark, atmospheric environment. The path is narrow and enclosed by thick vegetation, with mist obscuring the deeper woods ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rain-drenched rural property into the oppressive depths of a foggy forest. It begins by moving forward through a narrow, rain-soaked driveway, flanked by a yellow wooden house and a carport while ripples form on the wet ground. As the camera approaches a white vintage car parked ahead, the dark and foreboding atmosphere of the storm intensifies. The scene then shifts abruptly from the open property into a dense woodland, where the camera glides between towering pine trees under a persistent downpour. Finally, the path narrows and becomes enclosed by thick vegetation, with heavy mist obscuring the deeper woods ahead.
